round60_candidates.name: scale_once_a09992_soft
round60_candidates.description: Keep the R59-H scale-block once-per-phase route, but weaken alpha a notch to reduce zz / median back-pressure.
round60_candidates.rationale: First-order probe: preserve the whole hybrid route and only slightly soften the SCD cut.

round60_candidates.name: scale_once_a09992_soft_zzryz
round60_candidates.description: Same slightly softer scale-block SCD, plus a tiny iter2 state20 relief and a tiny ry_z confirmation.
round60_candidates.rationale: Direct repair attempt for the exact two items R59 gave back: dKg_zz and ry_z.

round60_candidates.name: scale_once_a09994_soft_zzryz
round60_candidates.description: Even softer scale-block SCD with the same tiny state20 / ry_z repair pair.
round60_candidates.rationale: Checks whether the round59 gain is robust enough to survive a second notch softer while better repairing zz / median.

round60_candidates.name: scale_once_a09992_soft_zzryz_xxhold
round60_candidates.description: Same soft alpha + zz/ry_z repair, but add an ultra-small state12 hold so xx / max do not drift back.
round60_candidates.rationale: If the softer SCD relaxes xx too much, this keeps the proven state12 line intact with only a 12-only micro-hold.
